sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7287" key="a)napo/sbestos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναπό-σβεστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n7287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inextinguishable,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1390.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hecat.Abd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
